prompt: A hyper-detailed cyberpunk close-up portrait of a futuristic woman cyborg, framed from the shoulders up and turned in 3/4 profile, looking directly at the viewer with one visible intense emerald-green eye. She has messy, wispy bright teal hair tied loosely back with stray strands falling across her face. The lower half of her face is covered by a translucent neon-lime skull-shaped respirator mask with visible teeth structure, glossy acrylic material, and internal glowing green highlights. Her head and neck are partially exposed mechanical anatomy: black metal plates, pistons, cables, micro-circuitry, screws, and robotic joints integrated into the jawline, temple, ear area, and throat. Include 5 visible ear piercings and industrial cybernetic details around the ear. Add subtle printed tech markings and tiny black tattoo-like decals on the forehead and cheek near the eye. She wears a black futuristic jacket with a high collar and a small caution-style label near the shoulder. Background is a soft-focus, saturated orange neon panel glow with blurred interface-like light blocks, creating strong color contrast against the teal hair and acid-green mask. Lighting is cinematic and glossy with sharp reflections on the mask and metal parts, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, high contrast, moody sci-fi atmosphere, premium concept art, photoreal, extremely detailed, 85mm portrait lens look.
